positive: A stylized and intricate mandala pattern featuring bioluminescent woodland flora, mythical celestial elements, and flowing geometric motifs. The composition must be highly symmetrical, centered on a core glowing light source, and fill the entire frame cleanly. Use a high-contrast palette of deep indigo, emerald green, cosmic sapphire, and glowing gold accents. The art style should mimic intricate stained-glass or detailed linework engraving, providing sharp, solid silhouettes and bold, clear outlines suitable for screen printing. Emphasize the interplay between organic, vine-like forms and abstract, stellar geometry. Studio shot, perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, high contrast lighting.
negative: blurry, grain, low resolution, washed out, simple, cartoon, realism, watermark, signature, text, logos, trademarks, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts
